function.arguments: {"command": "plan", "stage_list": [{"id": "S1", "name": "Requirements + Spec + Padframe + Advisory", "status": "done", "notes": "Complete. 512KB flash, 128KB SRAM, 1 ADC, 3 I2C, 17 IPs linked."}, {"id": "S2", "name": "Verification Planning", "status": "done", "notes": "97 checklist items, 21 scenario YAMLs."}, {"id": "S3", "name": "Generation (nc_chipgen generate)", "status": "done", "notes": "Design root mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/ complete."}, {"id": "S4", "name": "Verification Execution", "status": "done", "notes": "21/21 PASS."}, {"id": "S5", "name": "Verification Review + Dashboard + Advisory", "status": "done", "notes": "PROCEED_TO_PNR. 97/97 PASS."}, {"id": "S6", "name": "Physical Design (PnR) \u2014 Resume DRT", "status": "in_progress", "owner": "chipgen_pnr", "notes": "Synthesis/floorplan/PDN/placement/GR all done. CTS skipped (TritonCTS bug). Antenna repair done (step 67). DRT (step 69) was killed on session restart. Resuming with --last-run --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting. function.name: stage_tracker

stage_list.name: Requirements + Spec + Padframe + Advisory
stage_list.notes: Complete. 512KB flash, 128KB SRAM, 1 ADC, 3 I2C, 17 IPs linked.

stage_list.name: Physical Design (PnR) — Resume DRT
stage_list.notes: Synthesis/floorplan/PDN/placement/GR all done. CTS skipped (TritonCTS bug). Antenna repair done (step 67). DRT (step 69) was killed on session restart. Resuming with --last-run --from OpenROAD.DetailedRouting. Scope: synthesize custom RTL (hazard3+opendap+NC_*IPs+glue); CF_SRAM=black box; padframe/IO excluded (chip-top only); sky130 stdcell lib = tech target.
